projectDescription: An in-game BepInEx mod manager for Among Us that lets players install, enable, disable, and share DLL plugin packs via room codes without manually moving files.
keyFeatures: In-game mod manager UI accessible via F7 hotkey
Install DLL plugins from a native file picker without touching the game folder manually
Enable and disable mods individually or as grouped folders
Download shared mod packs using room codes from the Victor Launcher web manager
Signed manifest verification with RSA/SHA-256 to ensure pack integrity
Automatic backup of overwritten DLLs before install
VSK skin system for customizing the launcher appearance
Persistent state snapshot saved to victor-launcher-state.json after every change
publicApiSurface: ModFileService.GetMods() — list active and disabled managed mod entries
ModFileService.GetStagedMods() — list queued DLLs in mod-imports
ModFileService.StageDll(sourcePath) — queue a local DLL for install
ModFileService.InstallStagedMod(sourcePath) — move a queued DLL into plugins
ModFileService.Enable(fullPath) / Disable(fullPath) — toggle a single DLL
ModFileService.DeleteDisabled(fullPath) — permanently remove a disabled DLL
ModFileService.StageDownloadedDll(groupName, fileName, bytes) — stage a DLL downloaded from a room pack
SupabasePackService.DownloadPackAsync(roomCode, modFileService) — fetch and stage a signed room manifest
GameProcessService.PickDllAndStage(modFileService) — open native file picker and stage selected DLL
GameProcessService.CloseAmongUs() — quit the game via UnityEngine.Application.Quit
InstallPlanner.CreatePlan(amongUsDirectory, manifest, installedManifestIds) — produce an InstallPlan from a ModManifest
ModManifest — data model describing a mod: Id, Name, Version, GameVersion, Loader, Dependencies, Conflicts, Files
ModActionResult — result type with Succeeded flag and Message returned by all service operations
